figures.title: Disease Burden Choropleth Map
figures.caption: Geographic concentration of sars disease burden with country-level choropleth fill. Total cases: 0; Total deaths: 29,022. Sub-national locations annotated where available (120 locations mapped).

figures.title: Outbreak Timeline
figures.caption: Timeline of sars outbreaks by country (1994–2018). Darker bars indicate records with case data available. n=417 records across 20 countries.

figures.title: Annual Case Burden
figures.caption: Annual reported case burden from extracted sars outbreak records. (A) Confirmed and suspected cases stacked by year. (B) Reported deaths by year. Total confirmed: 135,330; total suspected: 7,601; total deaths: 23,467.

figures.title: Outbreak Records by Country
figures.caption: Complete geographic distribution of sars outbreak records across 22 countries.

figures.title: Seasonality of Outbreak Start
figures.caption: Seasonality of sars outbreak start month among records with available data (n=401).

figures.title: Evidence Availability
figures.caption: Evidence availability by variable group for sars extracted records (n=539). Vertical lines at 50% and 75% thresholds.
panels: Percentage of records with each variable

figures.title: Data Completeness Matrix
figures.caption: Data completeness matrix for sars outbreak records (n=539 records × 13 variables). Green indicates data present; light indicates missing.

figures.title: Data Completeness Summary
figures.caption: Completeness of extracted outbreak variables for sars (n=539). Colors indicate completeness thresholds: ≥75% (green), 50-74% (yellow), 25-49% (orange), <25% (red).

tables.title: Geographic Distribution
tables.caption: Distribution of extracted outbreak records by country (n=539).

tables.title: Ongoing Outbreaks
tables.caption: Status of outbreaks at time of extraction (n=539).

tables.title: Case Burden Summary
tables.caption: Summary statistics for reported case counts and deaths across extracted outbreaks.

tables.title: Case Fatality Ratio Summary
tables.caption: Summary of case fatality ratios computed from extracted outbreak data.

tables.title: Severity and Demographic Reporting
tables.caption: Availability of severity and demographic data across extracted outbreak records (n=539).
